title: Blood Libel: The Accusation That Haunted Jews for Centuries
title_zh: 血祭诽谤：困扰犹太人数百年的指控
title_he: עלילת הדם: האשמה שרדפה את היהודים במשך מאות שנים

historical_periods.chinese_equivalent: Southern Song Dynasty to Ming Dynasty (南宋至明朝)

header_image_prompt: A haunting Chinese brushstroke landscape showing a medieval European village in the foreground with a small synagogue, set against towering misty mountains in the background. Dark storm clouds gather overhead while a single ray of light breaks through, illuminating a Torah scroll. The composition uses dramatic contrast between dark ink washes and ethereal white space, with muted grays, deep blacks, and a subtle golden accent for the light beam. Style: traditional shan shui (山水) with somber, contemplative mood suggesting both persecution and endurance.
